info.title: WebApplicationFirewallManagement
info.description: APIs to manage web application firewall rules.

get.description: Gets all the load balancers in a subscription.

post.description: Swaps VIPs between two load balancers.

Location.description: The Location header contains the URL where the status of the long running operation can be checked.

Retry-After.description: The Retry-After header can indicate how long the client should wait before polling the operation status.

value.description: The InboundNatRule items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

InboundNatRulePortMapping.description: Individual port mappings for inbound NAT rule created for backend pool.

protocol.description: The reference to the transport protocol used by the inbound NAT rule.

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

LoadBalancerHealthPerRule.description: The response for a Health API.

up.description: Number of backend instances associated to the LB rule that are considered healthy.

down.description: Number of backend instances associated to the LB rule that are considered unhealthy.

loadBalancerBackendAddresses.description: Information about the health per rule of the backend addresses.

LoadBalancerHealthPerRulePerBackendAddre.description: The information about health per rule per backend address.

ipAddress.description: The IP address belonging to the backend address.

networkInterfaceIPConfigurationId.description: Resource ID of the Network Interface IP Configuration.

state.description: The current health of the backend instances that is associated to the LB rule.

LoadBalancerVipSwapRequest.description: The request for a VIP swap.

frontendIPConfigurations.description: A list of frontend IP configuration resources that should swap VIPs.

LoadBalancerVipSwapRequestFrontendIPConf.description: VIP swap request's frontend IP configuration object.

id.description: The ID of frontend IP configuration resource.

properties.description: The properties of VIP swap request's frontend IP configuration object.

LoadBalancerVipSwapRequestFrontendIPConf.description: The properties of VIP swap request's frontend IP configuration object.

publicIPAddress.description: A reference to public IP address resource.

MigrateLoadBalancerToIpBasedRequest.description: The request for a migrateToIpBased API.

pools.description: A list of pool names that should be migrated from Nic based to IP based pool

MigratedPools.description: The response for a migrateToIpBased API.

migratedPools.description: A list of pools migrated from Nic based to IP based pool

QueryInboundNatRulePortMappingRequest.description: The request for a QueryInboundNatRulePortMapping API. Either IpConfiguration or IpAddress should be set

ipConfiguration.description: NetworkInterfaceIPConfiguration set in load balancer backend address.

ipAddress.description: IP address set in load balancer backend address.
